title: Company Office Locations and Addresses
text: Our company has three main offices. Head Office (Bengaluru): 4th Floor, Salarpuria Tower, Koramangala, Bengaluru 560034. Sales Office (Mumbai): 2nd Floor, WeWork BKC, Bandra Kurla Complex, Mumbai 400051. Engineering Hub (Pune): 1st Floor, Magarpatta City, Pune 411013.

title: Executive Leadership Team
text: Company Leadership: Chief Executive Officer (CEO): Rohan Desai. Chief Technology Officer (CTO): Anita Menon. Chief Financial Officer (CFO): Vikram Singh. Head of Sales: Priya Sharma. Head of Customer Success: Karthik Nair.

title: Office Wi-Fi and IT Support Details
text: Office Wi-Fi Network: 'Corp-Guest-5G'. Guest Wi-Fi Password: 'WelcomeToCorp2024!'. Employee Wi-Fi: Connect using your individual LDAP credentials. For any IT issues, such as password resets or hardware requests, email it-helpdesk@company.internal or call extension 4040.

title: Annual Leave and Holiday Policy
text: Employees are entitled to 21 days of paid annual leave per calendar year. In addition, employees get 8 sick days and 10 public holidays. Sick leaves extending beyond 3 consecutive days require a medical certificate. Leave requests must be submitted via the HRMS portal at least 2 weeks in advance for planned vacations.

title: Work from Home (WFH) Guidelines
text: Our company follows a hybrid work model. Employees are expected to be in the office 3 days a week (Tuesday, Wednesday, and Thursday). Monday and Friday are flexible Work from Home days. For fully remote roles, employees must ensure a stable internet connection of at least 50 Mbps.

title: Expense Reimbursement Process
text: All employee expenses must be filed via the 'Expensify' app. Meal allowance during client travel is capped at ₹1,500 per day. Hotel bookings must not exceed ₹6,000 per night for Tier-1 cities. Reimbursements are processed on the 15th and 30th of every month. Receipts are mandatory for any expense above ₹500.

title: Sales Team Commission Structure 2024
text: Sales Account Managers earn a base salary plus commission. The commission rate is 5% of the first-year Annual Contract Value (ACV) for a new enterprise client. For contract renewals, the commission is 2% of the renewal value. Commissions are paid out quarterly. The quarterly quota for a Senior Account Manager is ₹1.5 crore.

title: New Employee Onboarding Schedule
text: New hires undergo a 3-day onboarding process. Day 1: HR induction and laptop setup (9 AM to 1 PM), followed by a welcome lunch. Day 2: Product architecture overview and shadowing support calls. Day 3: Manager 1-on-1 and goal setting for the first 30 days.
